name: profile_get
description: Read the AI profile for the current (or specified) project — includes persona, tech stack, LLM preference, and knowledge sources.

name: profile_set
description: Create or update the AI profile for a project. Sets the AI persona, tech stack, coding standards, and LLM backend.

description.description: What this project is and what it does

ai_persona.description: Custom system prompt addition for the AI when working on this project

coding_standards.description: Coding style guidelines (e.g. 'PEP 8, type hints required, 120-char line limit')

knowledge_sources.description: Documentation URLs to fetch and index for this project

name: profile_detect
description: Auto-detect the tech stack and suggest an AI profile by scanning project files (package.json, pyproject.toml, Cargo.toml, etc.).

name: rules_get
description: Get all AI rules for a project — constraints the agent must follow (must/must_not/prefer).

name: rules_add
description: Add a new rule to the project's AI rule set. Rules constrain how the agent implements things.

rule.description: The rule text (e.g. 'Always write docstrings for public functions')

name: rules_remove
description: Remove a rule from the project's AI rule set by its ID.

rule_id.description: ID of the rule to remove
